title: Growth Gateway: Women in Africa tech, funding guide
body: "This practical guide was developed by the Growth Gateway programme to support African women entrepreneurs in the technology sector who are navigating the complexities of startup fundraising.  Designed for early to growth-stage founders, the guide targets both the technical and strategic aspects of investor readiness. It covers funding types, investor engagement, pitch preparation, cap table structuring, and due diligence processes.  The guide includes tailored advice on overcoming gender-specific barriers, accessing women-focused investors and grants, and building strong media presence and investor relations.  It is a comprehensive resource for founders, incubators, and ecosystem enablers seeking to improve funding outcomes for women-led ventures.   Find out more about Growth Gateway.  "

taxons.title: Women and girls in developing countries
